SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2010 - JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT COURNALE AND CO.
